# Built-in AI Setup

Agent DVR supports integrated AI for object recognition, face detection, and plate reading.
**Note:** Some built-in AI features or push notifications generated by AI require a valid iSpyConnect Pro subscription.

## Recommendations for Stability

1. **Start Small**: Begin by enabling AI on a **single camera** only.
2. **Low Sampling**: Configure the AI sampling rate to evaluate only 1 or 2 frames per second. High framerate AI analysis will quickly overwhelm most systems.
3. **Decoder Default**: Leave the Agent DVR video decoder set to **CPU** until your single-camera AI setup proves stable. Do not attempt to force GPU acceleration immediately.
4. **Manual Model Management**: Do not auto-install external AI models. All necessary models should be managed exclusively through the Agent DVR web interface.
